underlying_goal: Optimize Claude Code efficiency/configuration and fix a broken Android project after dependency bumps and package rename
friction_detail: kotlinOptions migration attempt caused build failures due to AGP/KGP incompatibility requiring multiple rollbacks, and the location field kept getting overwritten by resolved display name requiring a follow-up fix.
brief_summary: User wanted to optimize Claude Code settings/hooks and fix a broken Android project after dependency bumps and renaming; all issues were systematically resolved through prioritized debugging and iterative fixes.
